diffs.diff:
--- a/make_blend_ckpt.py
+++ b/make_blend_ckpt.py
@@ -0,0 +1,42 @@
+import argparse

+import os

+import torch

+

+

+def update_blend(obj, value):

+    if isinstance(obj, dict):

+        for k, v in list(obj.items()):

+            lk = str(k).lower()

+            if isinstance(v, float) and ("blend" in lk or "noisy" in lk or "mix" in lk):

+                obj[k] = float(value)

+            elif torch.is_tensor(v) and v.numel() == 1 and ("blend" in lk or "noisy" in lk or "mix" in lk):

+                obj[k] = torch.tensor(float(value), dtype=v.dtype)

+            else:

+                update_blend(v, value)

+    elif isinstance(obj, list):

+        for v in obj:

+            update_blend(v, value)

+    elif isinstance(obj, tuple):

+        for v in obj:

+            update_blend(v, value)

+

+

+def main():

+    ap = argparse.ArgumentParser()

+    ap.add_argument("--src", default="checkpoints/metricgan_blend00285.pt")

+    ap.add_argument("--dst", default="checkpoints/metricgan_blend0028.pt")

+    ap.add_argument("--blend", type=float, default=0.028)

+    args = ap.parse_args()

+    ckpt = torch.load(args.src, map_location="cpu")

+    update_blend(ckpt, args.blend)

+    # Also set common top-level names explicitly in case predict.py uses them.

+    if isinstance(ckpt, dict):

+        for key in ["blend", "blend_noisy", "noisy_blend", "noisy_mix", "mix_noisy"]:

+            if key in ckpt:

+                ckpt[key] = float(args.blend)

+    os.makedirs(os.path.dirname(args.dst), exist_ok=True)

+    torch.save(ckpt, args.dst)

+

+

+if __name__ == "__main__":

+    main()
